entries.title: Getting Started
entries.content:
Welcome to MinionsOS! This wiki contains documentation and guides for using the system.

Key concepts:
- Roles: Autonomous agents that perform tasks
- Tasks: Units of work in the system
- DAG: Directed Acyclic Graph of task dependencies

entries.title: Roles
entries.content:
Roles are autonomous agents in MinionsOS. Each role has:

- A unique identifier
- Specific capabilities
- Access to tools and resources
- Ability to spawn sub-tasks

entries.title: Tasks
entries.content:
Tasks represent units of work in the system. They can be:

- Created by roles
- Dependent on other tasks
- Executed in parallel or sequentially
- Monitored for completion

entries.title: DAG Visualization
entries.content:
The DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph) view shows task dependencies:

- Nodes represent tasks
- Edges show dependencies
- Colors indicate task status
- Interactive exploration available
